brief.speaker: carol
brief.text: Which service peaks highest? One number per service — the maximum rate any single minute hit.

expected.sql: SELECT service, MAX(ROUND(n / 60.0, 2)) AS peak_rps FROM metrics GROUP BY service ORDER BY peak_rps DESC

hints.text: Carol: 'Too many rows. GROUP BY service — one row per service.'
Carol: 'Not enough rows. GROUP BY service.'
Carol: 'Query error. GROUP BY service — that column is called service.'
Carol: 'GROUP BY service. One row per service, highest rate for that service.'

success.speaker: carol
success.text: There it is. chrono-portal-mirror at the top by a wide margin. Everything else is noise.
